theme_archetype: Dual Experience: 90s MySpace Joke & Archetype 5 (Luxury) + 3 (Pastel & Soft) Future Glam

retro90s.container: max-w-[800px] mx-auto text-center border-4 border-ridge border-gray-500 p-4 bg-black text-lime-400

futureGlam.bento_ratios: col-span-12 md:col-span-8 for primary project, col-span-12 md:col-span-4 for secondary

components.RetroButton: bg-[#FF69B4] text-white border-[6px] border-outset border-pink-400 p-4 text-2xl font-bold cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#FF1493] rounded-none
components.FutureGlassCard: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/40 border border-white/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-500
components.MarqueeRetro: Text scrolling horizontally with HTML marquee tag style using framer-motion or CSS.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. STATE MANAGEMENT: Create a boolean state `isFuture` (default false). When false, render Retro90s component. When true, render FutureGlam component.

2. ENTRANCE SCREEN (Retro90s): Build an intentionally chaotic 90s MySpace theme. Use raw CSS styles: hot pinks, lime green text on black background, Comic Sans, tiled starry backgrounds (can be CSS radial gradients), mocked hit counters, and a massive 'Click here to enter' button.
3. TRANSITION: On clicking the button, trigger a dramatic framer-motion animation (sparkle explosion, full screen flash, scale up) before setting `isFuture` to true.

4. FUTURE PORTFOLIO (FutureGlam): This is the serious, gorgeous, C-Suite luxury feminine side. Light theme. Use Playfair Display for editorial serif headings (tight tracking) and DM Sans for clean body text.

5. GLASSMORPHISM & CHROME: Use the provided holographic images as extremely subtle, blurred backgrounds. The main containers must be high-end Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-white/40, delicate inner white borders).
6. GRID: Display the 5 projects in a Bento grid layout (e.g., one large hero project, others in smaller grid cells). Each project is its own 'futureGlassCard'.
7. TESTING: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (e.g., 'enter-portfolio-button', 'project-card-delulu', 'github-link').
8. TOGGLE: Add a tiny easter-egg button in the FutureGlam footer to toggle `isFuture` back to false.
